payload.description: Add a new ReportBlock that rebuilds a full topic memory view by re-indexing an entire dataset into an AWS OpenSearch vector index. Reuses cached embeddings so re-indexing does not mean re-embedding. Supports periodic global re-clustering (stable buckets), incremental assignment of new items into existing buckets between global runs, and memory weights (reinforcement + decay) stored as derived metadata. Two deployables: (1) a separate infra repo with a Python CDK stack provisioning OpenSearch + IAM, and (2) the Plexus repo with a new VectorTopicMemory ReportBlock, S3-backed embedding cache, OpenSearch client wrapper, clustering engine, and memory weight logic.
payload.title: Persistent Vector Topic Memory for Plexus Reports
